case_title: JOEL KIAMA MUTAHI VS. LEITHER PETERSON MOISE

docket_entries.description: REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 02/03/20. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
